title: Mizoram PSC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 51 Assistant, SAS and More Posts
post_name: Assistant Grade, Senior Horticulture Demonstrator, SAS-I
total_vacancies: Assistant Grade: 41 Posts | Senior Horticulture Demonstrator: 5 Posts | SAS-I: 5 Posts
short_info: Mizoram Public Service Commission (MPSC) has released two important recruitment notifications on 5th May 2026. The first is Limited Departmental Examination (LDE) for the post of Assistant Grade (Advt. No. 16 of 2026-27) and the second is Direct Recruitment for Senior Horticulture Demonstrator and Subordinate Agriculture Service-I (SAS-I) (Advt. No. 7 of 2026-27). Eligible candidates can submit online applications through the MPSC portal https://mpsconline.mizoram.gov.in till 12th June 2026 (4:00 PM). These recruitments offer excellent career opportunities in Group ‘B’ (Non-Gazetted) posts wit

application_fee.details: If payment is to be done through UPI, it may be done using only the mobile number used for one time registration. Persons with disabilities are exempted from payment of application fees. Fees once paid is non-refundable under any circumstances.

qualification.details: For Assistant Grade (LDE): | Officers holding UDC posts with 5 years regular service in the grade (3 years for those already in service as per earlier rules). Must fulfill conditions as per relevant Recruitment Rules. | For Senior Horticulture Demonstrator: | B.Sc. (Horticulture) from a recognized University. | For Subordinate Agriculture Service-I (SAS-I): | Bachelor’s Degree in Agriculture from a recognized University. | Common Requirements (Direct Recruitment): | Computer Proficiency: As prescribed by Mizoram Group ‘A’, ‘B’ & ‘C’ posts Service Rules 2023. Mizo Language Proficiency: Pass in qualifying test (exemption for those who studied Mizo up to Class-X or MIL). Age Limit: 18 to 35 years as on 01.01.2026 (relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST candidates).

how_to_apply: One-Time Registration: New users must complete One-Time Registration on the MPSC portal before filling the application.
Fill Online Application: Login and fill all personal, educational, and service details accurately.
Upload Required Documents: Upload scanned copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, Computer Proficiency Certificate, Mizo Language Certificate, etc.
Pay Application Fee: Pay the fee online (UPI using registered mobile number).
important_instructions: Applications must be submitted only through the official MPSC online portal. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Any false information or suppression of facts will result in cancellation of candidature. Government servants must apply through proper channel wherever applicable. Helpline: 0389-3596493 (10:00 AM to 4:00 PM on working days). All updates will be available only on the official MPSC website.
